content.rendered:
Uusi kielemme in Spanish

Do you speak Spanish? You can still learn Finnish on my old website! Elías Sendra Ausina did an awesome job on that, so until we manage to transfer his Spanish translations to the new site, you can find them in their old location.

¡Aprende ahora finés en español!

If you speak any language fluently and have some basic knowledge of html, I’d love to add other languages to my website as well. The new layout finally allows for that to happen. If you’re interested, you can contact me!

excerpt.rendered: If you speak any language fluently and have some basic knowledge of html, I’d love to add other languages to my website as well. The new layout finally allows for that to happen. If you’re interested, you can contact me!
